name: github_remove_org_copilot_seats_for_users
description: Remove users from the Copilot subscription for an organization (DELETE /orgs/{org}/copilot/billing/selected_users). selected_usernames required. Returns seats_cancelled. See [Remove users from the Copilot subscription for an organization](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot/copilot-user-manageme
